---
name: Documentation Update
about: Improve or clarify existing documentation
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation, triage
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe what part of the documentation needs work.

## Current Docs Issue

Explain what is outdated, missing, misleading, or incorrect.

## Proposed Update

Outline the changes you suggest.

## Impact

* [ ] Critical for onboarding
* [ ] Critical for release
* [ ] Blocks adoption
* [ ] Nice to have

## Supporting Materials

Link to the existing docs, related discussions, or external references.

## Additional Context

Add any other relevant notes, screenshots, or examples.
